# Copilot Instructions for `nuget-trivia`

## Documentation rules

- Write documentation in English.
- Write for external package consumers, not for internal collaborators.
- Prefer product-style documentation with sections such as package selection, getting started, data-source integration, and API reference.
- Do not mention AI agents, collaboration workflow, intermediate status, or internal working notes in published documentation.
- When in doubt, follow the tone and structure of official product documentation.

## Scope

- Keep documentation focused on `Italbytz.Trivia.*` packages and public trivia-question scenarios.
- Favor concise, skimmable guidance over internal consolidation notes.
